headline: HSBC Results Disappoint on Surprise $400 Million MFS Charge
summary: (Bloomberg) -- HSBC Holdings Plc reported profit that missed estimates, weighed down by an unexpected charge related to the collapse of UK mortgage lender Market Financial Solutions Ltd. and rising economic risks stemming from the conflict in the Middle East.Most Read from BloombergUS Has Opened a Passage Through Hormuz, Central Command SaysUS and Iran Trade Fire in Gulf, Jolting Four-Week-Old TruceChina’s Rare Sanctions Pushback Leaves Banks Caught in CrossfireFormer NYC Mayor Giuliani in Criti
